creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
Upgrade to 1.0.2

Fix: Apply the patch. Make sure, that the files directory is empty afterwards!


--Boundary-00=_eOQgG7Qohfo20U4
Content-Type: text/x-diff;
  charset="iso-8859-1";
  name="k3b.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment;
	filename="k3b.diff"



--Boundary-00=_eOQgG7Qohfo20U4----FAx58qs1F5OXkSkymYnWPEpY2uYWLn3s4MCJL3LaCVhc0mlO
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -urN ../../sysutils/k3b/Makefile ./Makefile
--- ../../sysutils/k3b/Makefile	Tue Jun  5 15:32:38 2007
+++ ./Makefile	Tue Jun 26 09:15:08 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	k3b
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils multimedia kde
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
diff -urN ../../sysutils/k3b/distinfo ./distinfo
--- ../../sysutils/k3b/distinfo	Tue Jun  5 15:32:38 2007
+++ ./distinfo	Tue Jun 26 09:17:38 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (k3b-1.0.1.tar.bz2) = 8abd11f56e6e40d6f2d0b076a5f8b8ed
-SHA256 (k3b-1.0.1.tar.bz2) = 609c56d4a9e0b41d545e377d61904e99a46e878280d6a6651a65f72f94acb65e
-SIZE (k3b-1.0.1.tar.bz2) = 5097997
+MD5 (k3b-1.0.2.tar.bz2) = b9307b3de0d15880a57c23a007bffca4
+SHA256 (k3b-1.0.2.tar.bz2) = 957bf427b9919a21e5b61aa20046cd7b51bb3867cea4cbe4a6c8bd28af36f9f0
+SIZE (k3b-1.0.2.tar.bz2) = 5098893
diff -urN ../../sysutils/k3b/files/patch-configure ./files/patch-configure
--- ../../sysutils/k3b/files/patch-configure	Mon May 28 17:56:36 2007
+++ ./files/patch-configure	Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
---- configure.orig	Sat Apr 21 00:42:59 2007
-+++ configure	Sat Apr 21 00:45:23 2007
-@@ -36535,7 +36535,7 @@
- 
- rm -f core conftest.err conftest.$ac_objext conftest.$ac_ext
- 	OLD_LIBS=$LIBS
--	LIBS="-lavformat -lavcodec -ldl $LIBS"
-+	LIBS="-lavformat -lavcodec $LIBS"
- 	cat >conftest.$ac_ext <<_ACEOF
- extern "C" {
- 		#include <ffmpeg/avformat.h>
